'''鈭歯g-g-r-th''' ('''kangagrethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:braize|braize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-g-r-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:braize|braize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-g-r-th
|-
! Lemma
| kangagrethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingagrethoko|thingagrethoko]] || [[word:jingagrethoko|jingagrethoko]] || [[word:shingagrethoko|shingagrethoko]] || [[word:kingagrethoko|kingagrethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungagrethoko|thuthungagrethoko]] || [[word:jujungagrethoko|jujungagrethoko]] || [[word:shushungagrethoko|shushungagrethoko]] || [[word:kukungagrethoko|kukungagrethoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ngagrethoko|th忙ngagrethoko]] || [[word:j忙ngagrethoko|j忙ngagrethoko]] || [[word:sh忙ngagrethoko|sh忙ngagrethoko]] || [[word:k忙ngagrethoko|k忙ngagrethoko]]
|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
